title: Email artifact utility that downloads and triggers email client
purpose: Provides a function to download an artifact file and open the user's email client with pre-filled subject and body for attachment.

methods.name: emailArtifact
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, item: Item): Promise<void>

steps.content: Download the artifact file for the specified project, session, and item.
Construct a URL-encoded email subject including the item name.
Construct a URL-encoded email body including the item name.
Navigate the browser to the mailto URL to open the default email client.
